---
title: "Explora Eventos Culturales en la CDMX"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cyborg
    css: styles.css
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/dar4datascience/AWS-SAM-Cultura-CDMX
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// ── 1. Load data via DuckDB-Wasm (built into Quarto's OJS runtime) ──────────
// DuckDBClient is globally available in {ojs} cells — no import needed.

PARQUET_URL = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/dar4datascience/AWS-SAM-Cultura-CDMX@main/data/scraped_data_cultura_cartelera_cdmx.parquet"

db = {
  const client = await DuckDBClient.of();
  await client.sql`
    CREATE TABLE events AS
    SELECT
      evento,
      recinto,
      schedule.date  AS fecha_raw,
      schedule.hour  AS hora,
      location,
      banner_url,
      detail_url,
      list_aggregate(description, 'string_agg', ' ')   AS descripcion,
      list_aggregate(info,        'string_agg', ' | ') AS info_text
    FROM read_parquet(${PARQUET_URL})
    ORDER BY schedule.date
  `;
  return client;
}

allEvents = {
  const MESES = {
    enero:1, febrero:2, marzo:3, abril:4, mayo:5, junio:6,
    julio:7, agosto:8, septiembre:9, octubre:10, noviembre:11, diciembre:12
  };
  function parseDate(raw) {
    if (!raw) return "";
    const m = raw.match(/(\d{1,2})\s+De\s+(\w+)\s+De\s+(\d{4})/i);
    if (!m) return "";
    const day = m[1].padStart(2,"0");
    const mon = String(MESES[m[2].toLowerCase()] || 0).padStart(2,"0");
    const yr  = m[3];
    return `${yr}-${mon}-${day}`;
  }
  const rows = await db.query("SELECT * FROM events");
  return rows.map(r => ({ ...r, fecha_iso: parseDate(r.fecha_raw) }));
}

// Sorted unique ISO dates that have events (for calendar dots)
eventDates = new Set(allEvents.map(e => e.fecha_iso).filter(Boolean))
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// ── 2. Search input ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof searchText = Inputs.text({
  placeholder: "Buscar evento o recinto…",
  width: "100%"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// ── 3. Calendar widget ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Custom mutable state for calendar mode + selections
mutable calMode    = "range"   // "range" | "days"
mutable rangeStart = null
mutable rangeEnd   = null
mutable selectedDays = new Set()
mutable calYear    = parseInt([...eventDates].sort()[0]?.slice(0,4) ?? new Date().getFullYear())
mutable calMonth   = parseInt([...eventDates].sort()[0]?.slice(5,7) ?? new Date().getMonth()+1) - 1

calendarWidget = {
  const MONTH_NAMES = ["Enero","Febrero","Marzo","Abril","Mayo","Junio",
                       "Julio","Agosto","Septiembre","Octubre","Noviembre","Diciembre"];
  const DAY_NAMES   = ["Dom","Lun","Mar","Mié","Jue","Vie","Sáb"];

  function isoToDisplay(iso) {
    if (!iso) return "";
    const [y,mo,d] = iso.split("-");
    return `${d}/${mo}/${y}`;
  }

  function renderGrid() {
    const yr  = calYear;
    const mo  = calMonth;
    const firstDay    = new Date(yr, mo, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(yr, mo + 1, 0).getDate();

    let cells = DAY_NAMES.map(d =>
      htl.html`<div class="cal-head">${d}</div>`
    );
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
      cells.push(htl.html`<div class="cal-cell empty"></div>`);
    }
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const iso = `${yr}-${String(mo+1).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(d).padStart(2,"0")}`;
      const lo = rangeStart && rangeEnd
        ? (rangeStart < rangeEnd ? rangeStart : rangeEnd)
        : rangeStart;
      const hi = rangeStart && rangeEnd
        ? (rangeStart < rangeEnd ? rangeEnd   : rangeStart)
        : null;

      const classes = [
        "cal-cell",
        eventDates.has(iso)     ? "has-event"    : "",
        calMode === "range" && lo && iso === lo  ? "range-start"  : "",
        calMode === "range" && hi && iso === hi  ? "range-end"    : "",
        calMode === "range" && lo && hi && iso > lo && iso < hi ? "in-range" : "",
        calMode === "days"  && selectedDays.has(iso) ? "selected-day" : ""
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ");

      const cell = htl.html`<div class=${classes}>${d}</div>`;
      cell.addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (calMode === "range") {
          if (!rangeStart || (rangeStart && rangeEnd)) {
            mutable rangeStart = iso;
            mutable rangeEnd   = null;
          } else {
            mutable rangeEnd = iso;
          }
        } else {
          const next = new Set(selectedDays);
          next.has(iso) ? next.delete(iso) : next.add(iso);
          mutable selectedDays = next;
        }
        container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
      });
      cells.push(cell);
    }
    return cells;
  }

  function buildWidget() {
    // Mode toggle bar
    const btnRange = htl.html`<button class="mode-btn ${calMode==="range"?"active":""}">Rango</button>`;
    const btnDays  = htl.html`<button class="mode-btn ${calMode==="days" ?"active":""}">Días</button>`;
    const btnClear = htl.html`<button class="mode-btn clear-btn">✕ Limpiar</button>`;

    btnRange.onclick = () => { mutable calMode = "range"; container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget()); };
    btnDays.onclick  = () => { mutable calMode = "days";  container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget()); };
    btnClear.onclick = () => {
      mutable rangeStart   = null;
      mutable rangeEnd     = null;
      mutable selectedDays = new Set();
      container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
    };

    const toggleBar = htl.html`<div class="calendar-mode-toggle">${btnRange}${btnDays}${btnClear}</div>`;

    // Hint text
    let hintText = "";
    if (calMode === "range") {
      if (!rangeStart)     hintText = "Selecciona fecha de inicio";
      else if (!rangeEnd)  hintText = "Ahora selecciona fecha de fin";
      else                 hintText = `${isoToDisplay(rangeStart)} → ${isoToDisplay(rangeEnd)}`;
    } else {
      hintText = selectedDays.size > 0
        ? `${selectedDays.size} día(s) seleccionado(s)`
        : "Haz clic en uno o más días";
    }
    const hint = htl.html`<div class="cal-hint">${hintText}</div>`;

    // Navigation
    const prevBtn = htl.html`<button class="cal-nav-btn">‹</button>`;
    const nextBtn = htl.html`<button class="cal-nav-btn">›</button>`;
    prevBtn.onclick = () => {
      let m = calMonth - 1, y = calYear;
      if (m < 0) { m = 11; y--; }
      mutable calMonth = m;
      mutable calYear  = y;
      container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
    };
    nextBtn.onclick = () => {
      let m = calMonth + 1, y = calYear;
      if (m > 11) { m = 0; y++; }
      mutable calMonth = m;
      mutable calYear  = y;
      container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
    };
    const nav = htl.html`<div class="calendar-nav">${prevBtn}<span class="cal-month-label">${MONTH_NAMES[calMonth]} ${calYear}</span>${nextBtn}</div>`;

    // Grid
    const grid = htl.html`<div class="calendar-grid">${renderGrid()}</div>`;

    return [toggleBar, hint, nav, grid];
  }

  const container = htl.html`<div class="calendar-container"></div>`;
  container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
  return container;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// ── 4. Reactive filtered dataset ────────────────────────────────────────────
filtered = {
  const q = searchText.trim().toLowerCase();
  return allEvents.filter(e => {
    if (q) {
      const hay = `${e.evento||""} ${e.recinto||""}`.toLowerCase();
      if (!hay.includes(q)) return false;
    }
    if (calMode === "range" && (rangeStart || rangeEnd)) {
      const d = e.fecha_iso;
      if (!d) return false;
      const lo = rangeStart && rangeEnd ? Math.min(rangeStart, rangeEnd) : rangeStart;
      const hi = rangeStart && rangeEnd ? Math.max(rangeStart, rangeEnd) : null;
      if (lo && d < lo) return false;
      if (hi && d > hi) return false;
      if (lo && !hi && d !== lo) return false;
    } else if (calMode === "days" && selectedDays.size > 0) {
      if (!selectedDays.has(e.fecha_iso)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// ── 5. Table with poster images ──────────────────────────────────────────────
eventsTable = {
  const rows = filtered.map(e => {
    const poster = (e.banner_url && e.detail_url)
      ? htl.html`<a href="${e.detail_url}" target="_blank"><img src="${e.banner_url}" class="event-poster" loading="lazy"></a>`
      : "";
    const link = e.detail_url
      ? htl.html`<a href="${e.detail_url}" target="_blank" class="ver-link">Ver →</a>`
      : "";
    const infoHtml = (e.info_text || "").replace(/\s*\|\s*/g, "<br>");
    return htl.html`<tr>
      <td class="col-poster">${poster}</td>
      <td class="col-evento">${e.evento || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-fecha">${e.fecha_iso ? e.fecha_iso.split("-").reverse().join("/") : ""}</td>
      <td class="col-hora">${e.hora || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-recinto">${e.recinto || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-info">${htl.html([infoHtml])}</td>
      <td class="col-location">${e.location || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-link">${link}</td>
    </tr>`;
  });

  return htl.html`<div class="table-wrapper">
    <table id="events-table">
      <thead><tr>
        <th>Poster</th>
        <th>Evento</th>
        <th>Fecha</th>
        <th>Hora</th>
        <th>Recinto</th>
        <th>Info</th>
        <th>Ubicación</th>
        <th>Enlace</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
    </table>
  </div>`;
}
```

# {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
viewof searchText
```

---

```{ojs}
calendarWidget
```

---

```{ojs}
htl.html`<div class="event-count">${filtered.length} evento${filtered.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} encontrado${filtered.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}</div>`
```

# Eventos Culturales CDMX

```{ojs}
eventsTable
```
